prompt: A clothing boutique purchased 80 designer t-shirts for $15 each. They initially marked up the price by 60%. During the first week, they sold 75% of the t-shirts at this marked-up price. The following week, they decided to sell the remaining t-shirts at a 25% discount off the *original marked-up price*. What was the total profit the boutique made from selling all the t-shirts?
